subcodes.first_line: O Majíd! Hearken unto the voice of this Grief-Stricken One, Who sweareth by the Sun of the horizon of divine detachment that from the beginning of creation until [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مجید بشنو ندای این محزونرا که قسم بافتاب افق عز تجرید که از اول ابداع تا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
